row_grain: one key per top-level responsibility
cardinality_expectation: 49 top-level responsibility IDs; each responsibility appears exactly once in delegation trace
validation_rule: Every RSP-CAN-001 through RSP-CAN-049 must be reachable from rollup index.
query_usage: Trace a responsibility to obligation, entity, governed object, enablement, surface, contract, gap, and doctrine.
notes: Primary semantic key for responsibility-level navigation.

row_grain: one key per top-level obligation
cardinality_expectation: 49 top-level obligation IDs; numerically aligned with responsibilities
validation_rule: Every OBL-CAN-### must align with RSP-CAN-### unless explicitly migrated by governance.
query_usage: Trace enforceable obligation to enforcing entity, governed object, responsibility, and anti-collapse rule.
notes: Primary enforcement key for obligation-level navigation.

row_grain: one key per structured sub-responsibility
cardinality_expectation: 12 total special sub-responsibilities; 7 flags and 5 reports
validation_rule: Sub-responsibilities under RSP-CAN-025 must govern BCO-013; sub-responsibilities under RSP-CAN-048 must govern BCO-014.
query_usage: List delivery-cycle flag or dispatcher feedback report expansions.
notes: Used for the two explicit expansion groups only in this release.

row_grain: one parent per sub-responsibility row
cardinality_expectation: many sub-responsibilities to one parent responsibility
validation_rule: RSP-CAN-025 sub-responsibilities must map to OBL-CAN-025; RSP-CAN-048 sub-responsibilities must map to OBL-CAN-048.
query_usage: Join sub-responsibility records to top-level responsibility family and trace rows.

row_grain: one parent obligation per sub-responsibility row
cardinality_expectation: many sub-responsibilities to one parent obligation
validation_rule: Parent obligation must be numerically aligned with parent responsibility.
query_usage: Trace detailed flag/report obligations to parent enforcement row.

row_grain: one family groups multiple responsibilities
validation_rule: Every top-level responsibility must belong to exactly one responsibility family.
query_usage: Roll up responsibilities by architectural family.

row_grain: one row per responsibility delegation
validation_rule: Each delegation_id must join to exactly one responsibility_id and one trace_id.
query_usage: Join delegation matrix to trace register.

row_grain: one row per top-level responsibility trace
validation_rule: Every trace row must include responsibility_id, obligation_id, entity, governed object, enablement, and surface.
query_usage: Resolve full trace record and trace quality.

row_grain: one or more primary delegated entities per responsibility or obligation row
validation_rule: Primary delegated entity must be a responsibility carrier, not a governed artifact or classification-only layer.
query_usage: Find who carries a responsibility or obligation.

row_grain: zero or more supporting entities per row
cardinality_expectation: zero-to-many from responsibility to supporting entity
validation_rule: Supporting entities participate but do not replace primary delegated or enforcing entity.
query_usage: Find support dependencies for a responsibility.

key_scope: new entity or governed artifact registration
row_grain: one key per new/promoted entity or artifact
cardinality_expectation: 7 mandatory records in package 05 new entities register
validation_rule: E-INT-011..014 are delegated entities; BCO-012..014 are governed artifacts and not primary delegates.
query_usage: Resolve whether a newly promoted subject is an actor/entity or governed artifact.

row_grain: one or more governed objects per responsibility or obligation row
cardinality_expectation: one-to-many from responsibility/obligation to governed object
validation_rule: Governed objects must not be promoted to primary delegated entity unless explicitly reclassified by governance.
query_usage: Find what object is governed by a responsibility or obligation.

row_grain: one governed object per dedicated row
cardinality_expectation: one row to one governed object
validation_rule: Flag rows must use BCO-013; report rows must use BCO-014.
query_usage: Validate flag/report governed-object separation.

row_grain: one or more enablement families per row
cardinality_expectation: one-to-many from responsibility/obligation/entity to enablement family
validation_rule: Every responsibility and obligation row must reference at least one enablement family.
query_usage: Find responsibilities requiring a capability family.

row_grain: one enablement per dedicated row or rollup item
cardinality_expectation: one row to one enablement family
validation_rule: EN-FAM-006 is required for dispatcher feedback and delivery-cycle flag artifacts.
query_usage: Validate dedicated flag/report enablement.

row_grain: one or more surfaces per row
validation_rule: Every responsibility/obligation trace row must reference at least one surface.
query_usage: Find administrative, managerial, consuming, boundary, contractual, observability, or cross-surface exposure.

row_grain: one surface per dedicated index row
validation_rule: SURF-OBSERVABILITY is a derived surface and must not replace managerial responsibility.
query_usage: Resolve surface-level taxonomy and derived observability use.

row_grain: one contract trace cluster
validation_rule: Every contract_id must map to one contract family and at least one responsibility.
query_usage: Find responsibilities derived from a contract.

row_grain: one or more contract IDs or contract family IDs per row
validation_rule: Contract trace IDs must resolve to canonical contract IDs or contract-family IDs.
query_usage: Trace responsibility or gap to contract source.

row_grain: one family groups multiple contracts
validation_rule: Every contract family must have at least one contract and at least one derived responsibility.
query_usage: Roll up contracts by family.

row_grain: one core gap closure row
validation_rule: Every G-001 through G-007 must have full coverage status.
query_usage: Find closure statement, covering responsibilities, preserving obligations, and anti-regression rule.

row_grain: zero or more gap IDs per row
validation_rule: Gap trace IDs must resolve to one of G-001 through G-007 unless later governance expands gap set.
query_usage: Find which responsibilities, obligations, or contracts cover a gap.

row_grain: one doctrine concept
cardinality_expectation: doctrine IDs may repeat across many rows
validation_rule: Doctrine references must preserve anti-collapse semantics and not become implementation classes.
query_usage: Find all rows preserving Queue-as-Container or contract-template doctrine.

row_grain: zero or more doctrine IDs per row
cardinality_expectation: many-to-many between trace rows and doctrines
validation_rule: Doctrine trace IDs must refer to known doctrine rules or be explicitly marked as future doctrine candidates.
query_usage: Trace anti-collapse doctrine coverage.

row_grain: one taxonomy update row
validation_rule: Taxonomy updates must record subject, change type, new status, reason, and anti-collapse rule.
query_usage: Find taxonomy promotions, corrections, splits, and ontology seed candidates.

row_grain: zero or more taxonomy update references per row
cardinality_expectation: many-to-many between gaps and taxonomy updates
validation_rule: Taxonomy traces must resolve to registered taxonomy updates or canonical semantic update subjects.
query_usage: Show which taxonomy corrections support a gap closure.
notes: Some semantic IDs are retained for human readability.

row_grain: one or more taxonomy layers per record
cardinality_expectation: many-to-many between subjects and taxonomy layers
validation_rule: Taxonomy layer IDs must preserve hierarchy and must not replace entity IDs.
query_usage: Find which taxonomy layer a concept belongs to.
notes: Layer IDs support future ontology extraction.

row_grain: one row per policy-consuming component
validation_rule: Metadata Injector must not appear as a policy-consuming component.
query_usage: Find which components can host policy mechanism semantics.

row_grain: one row per port/surface entity
cardinality_expectation: one port ID may support multiple contracts
validation_rule: Ports are contract surfaces and must not erase actor distinctions.
query_usage: Resolve ingress, administrative, and registry/delivery ports.

row_grain: one row per delivery-cycle flag
validation_rule: Every flag delegation row must govern BCO-013 and must not govern BCO-014.
query_usage: Find compact delivery-cycle flag semantics.

row_grain: one row per dispatcher feedback report
validation_rule: Every report delegation row must govern BCO-014 and must not govern BCO-013.
query_usage: Find detailed dispatcher feedback report semantics.

row_grain: one row per gap closure coverage record
validation_rule: Gap coverage row is invalid without covering responsibilities, preserving obligations, entities, objects, enablements, surfaces, and anti-regression rule.
query_usage: Resolve complete gap closure record.

row_grain: one row per canonical contract trace cluster
validation_rule: Each contract trace row must include contract_id, family, derived responsibility IDs, obligation IDs, entities, objects, enablements, surfaces, and trace status.
query_usage: Resolve contract-to-responsibility derivation record.

row_grain: one row per new/promoted entity or artifact
validation_rule: New entity register must include four delegated entities and three governed artifacts.
query_usage: Resolve new/promoted entity or governed artifact metadata.

row_grain: one category per taxonomy update row
validation_rule: Value must be one of the allowed taxonomy update categories.
query_usage: Filter taxonomy updates by correction type.

row_grain: one kind per new entity register row
validation_rule: Governed artifacts must not be primary delegates.
query_usage: Filter new records by actor/entity versus artifact status.

row_grain: one status per trace or gap row
validation_rule: Release V2 canonical rows should be covered unless explicitly marked otherwise.
query_usage: Filter incomplete or invalid coverage rows.

row_grain: one quality value per trace row
validation_rule: Canonical V2 trace rows should be strong or adequate; invalid blocks release.
query_usage: Find weak traces needing review.

row_grain: one guard per anti-collapse rule cluster
validation_rule: Every guard must identify blocked collapse, canonical rule, subject IDs, and source files.
query_usage: Look up anti-collapse protection for a concept.
notes: Rollup-local navigation key; summarizes upstream semantics.

row_grain: one query family or rollup query pattern
validation_rule: Query family must point to source files and expected output fields.
query_usage: Find recommended lookup path for a user question.
